CTA.r: Applied experience in secure development, infrastructure, and engineering strategy

sections.title: Security & Infrastructure
sections.description: Currently deepening my focus on AppSec and infrastructure security.

items.title: AppSec
items.content: API hardening, OWASP Top 10 mitigation, JWT security, and secure secrets management (Environ/Vault).

items.title: Infrastructure as code
items.content: Service orchestration with Docker and Docker Compose, including Nginx reverse proxy configuration.

items.title: DevSecOps
items.content: CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions, vulnerability scanning, and secure deployments on AWS, Azure, and Heroku.

items.title: Networking
items.content: Private network management, communication protocols, and perimeter security.

sections.title: Core Software Engineering
sections.description: A strong technical foundation to build robust end-to-end products.

items.title: Backend
items.content: Python with Django and FastAPI, robust REST API design, and optimization in PostgreSQL and MySQL.

items.title: Frontend
items.content: React.js and Next.js (14+), async state with TanStack Query, and styling with Tailwind CSS and SASS.

items.title: Integrations
items.content: Abstraction of complex services such as Microsoft Graph API and corporate SSO authentication with Azure AD/MSAL.

sections.title: Engineering Strategy
sections.description: A strategic approach to align architecture, execution, and business outcomes.

items.title: Software architecture
items.content: Design of decoupled monoliths, compliance-oriented data modeling, and clean code principles.

items.title: Stakeholder management
items.content: Requirements engineering and effective communication with management in corporate and government environments.

items.title: Agile methodologies
items.content: Project delivery under Scrum with continuous value delivery.

caption: I collaborate on projects where technical robustness and security are first-class priorities from day one.
